title: MCP Servers
description: Manage Model Context Protocol servers that extend AI capabilities with external tools and data sources.
noServersHint: Add an MCP server to give your AI agents access to external tools like databases, APIs, and file systems.
transportHint: How the gateway connects to this MCP server.
commandHint: Path to the MCP server executable.
envHint: Key-value pairs passed to the process.
headersHint: Custom HTTP headers (e.g., Authorization). Values are stored securely.
subscriptionLabel: Managed by subscription — critical fields cannot be edited.
deleteConfirm: Delete MCP server "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
serverNameHint: Unique identifier for this MCP server (e.g., "my-database").
validationCommandRequired: Command is required for stdio transport.
validationUrlRequired: URL is required for sse / streamable-http transport.
